children.text: shall, except for the authority contained in , be delegated on request to the appropriate executive agency when the estimated cost of the project does not exceed $100,000; andsection 3305(b) of this title
may be delegated to the appropriate executive agency when the Administrator determines that delegation will promote efficiency and economy.

children.heading: .—No Exemption From Other Provisions of Chapter
children.label: b .—No Exemption From Other Provisions of Chapter
children.text: Delegation under subsection (a) does not exempt the person to whom the delegation is made, or the carrying out of the delegated duty or power, from any other provision of this chapter.
